title: FoodItem
description: A food product in the database. All macro values are per 100g. Single source of truth for calorie calculations — never overridden by AI.

id.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4). Immutable after creation.

name.description: Primary display name in English. Used as fallback when locale translation is missing.

calories_per_100g.description: Kilocalories per 100g. Source of truth — must never be modified by AI layer.

protein_per_100g.description: Grams of protein per 100g of food.

carbs_per_100g.description: Grams of carbohydrates per 100g of food.

fat_per_100g.description: Grams of fat per 100g of food.

fiber_per_100g.description: Grams of dietary fiber per 100g. Optional — not used in MVP 1 calorie calculations.

default_serving_g.description: Suggested default portion size in grams. Hint for Agent 5 (Meal Planning Engine). Not authoritative.

category.description: Broad food category. Used by Agent 5 for meal composition logic.

name_translations.description: Multilingual display names keyed by BCP-47 language tag (e.g. 'he', 'ar', 'fr'). Agent 8 selects matching locale; falls back to top-level 'name' if key is absent.

aliases.description: Alternative names used by Agent 3 for search and matching. Not displayed to users.

is_custom.description: true = created manually by a user; false = from global food database.

created_by_user_id.description: Required when is_custom = true. References the User.id who created this item. Null for global DB entries.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime. Set on creation, immutable.
